claim_boundary: Real public external sources were used where available. Full external validation remains blocked until official MIDI-B data/answer keys/validator, reviewer identities, authorization, and signing/native-runner resources are supplied.

modern_rsna_anonymizer.reason: PyPI rsna-anonymizer 18.0.7 requires Python >=3.12,<3.13; only Python 3.11 is registered locally.

remaining_blockers: MIDI-B corpus/answer keys/mappings were not downloaded or supplied. Local free space after downloads was 3,699,666,944 bytes, below the observed 7.63 GB validation download alone.
Official MIDI-B validator and official challenge scoring access were not supplied.
Synapse challenge remains closed and any restricted/test-phase access must come from authorized project-owner credentials or access grants.
Modern RSNA Anonymizer was not installed because the local Python runtime is 3.11 and the package requires Python >=3.12,<3.13.
RSNA CTP was downloaded and extracted but did not present a runnable directory anonymizer pipeline; Runner.jar -help throws NullPointerException.
Two independent blinded human reviewers and an adjudicator were not supplied.
Institutional endpoints, authorization letters, native GitHub runner provenance, and code-signing/notarization credentials were not supplied.

rsna_dat.ctp_probe: CTP Runner.jar -help throws NullPointerException before help output; CTP is acquired but not configured/executed.
rsna_dat.tool: RSNA DicomAnonymizerTool DAT.jar from legacy RSNA downloads

sources.name: TCIA MIDI-B-Test-MIDI-B-Validation collection
sources.used_for: Identified the public MIDI-B data source. The validation download was observed as 7.63 GB, which exceeds local free disk space during this run.

sources.name: MIDI resources paper
sources.used_for: Confirmed MIDI dataset scope: validation/test subjects, instances, synthetic PHI/PII, answer keys, validation script, and TCIA DOI/resource availability.

sources.name: Synapse MIDI-B challenge
sources.used_for: Confirmed challenge status, model-to-data nature, and challenge data folder metadata.

sources.name: Orthanc Docker documentation
sources.used_for: Confirmed official Docker-based Orthanc operation and ports.

sources.name: Docker Hub orthancteam/orthanc
sources.used_for: Confirmed orthancteam/orthanc published image component information.

sources.name: RSNA DicomAnonymizerTool wiki
sources.used_for: Confirmed DAT command-line usage: java -jar DAT.jar with -in and -out arguments.

sources.name: RSNA legacy mirc.rsna.org downloads repository
sources.used_for: Downloaded and hashed RSNA legacy installer JARs without redistributing them in public artifacts.

sources.name: RSNA Anonymizer PyPI
sources.used_for: Confirmed latest package metadata, release date, Python >=3.12,<3.13 requirement, hashes, and provenance metadata.

sources.name: NBIA Toolkit documentation
sources.used_for: Confirmed programmatic NBIA/TCIA access paths and Guest/OAuth access distinction.
